name: shelf
description: Shelf is Tavi's local collection of frequently used Codex skills.

interface.shortDescription: A self-contained shelf of frequently used Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: Shelf is a local Codex plugin that bundles copied snapshots of Tavi's project-starting, planning, Effect v4, generated-artifact, router, and highest-use workflow skills into one easy-to-find collection. The copied layout keeps skill discovery working after Codex installs the plugin into its cache.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Shelf skills when they match the task.
